case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JESUS SERVANDO TILLERO SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT JESUS SERVANDO TILLERO SANCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-21-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT JESUS SERVANDO TILLERO SANCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT JESUS SERVANDO TILLERO SANCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE CASE IS SETTLED AND REQUESTS A DISMISSAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TILLERO SANCHEZ, JESUS SERVANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
